attr.title: Monolith
attr.desc: Descending in the darkness of a long-abandoned facility, a lone ship searches for wealth, power, and the scattered pieces of the past.
attr.inst: Purchase the game from itch.io (https://team-d-13.itch.io/monolith), grab the Windows version (Monolith.exe), and and copy it to the port directory.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game from [itch.io](https://team-d-13.itch.io/monolith), grab the Windows version (Monolith.exe), and and copy it to the port directory.
